---
title: "Hello, my name is Leia Kawamura"
image: "files/0151.jpg"
about:
  template: jolla
---

# A little about me

::: {.intro-card}
I love people, and I am learning how data can help us understand people better.

I hope to bring people and data together to support smarter business decisions, especially in marketing, customer experience, and future coffee industry opportunities.

**I am actively seeking internship and full-time opportunities.
Feel free to reach out — I’d love to connect!**
:::

::: {.contact-icons}
<a href="mailto:Reia.Kawamura@rady.ucsd.edu" class="contact-icon" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" aria-label="Email">
  <i class="bi bi-envelope"></i>
</a>

<a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/princessleiak" class="contact-icon" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" aria-label="LinkedIn">
  <i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i>
</a>

<a href="https://github.com/leiakawamura" class="contact-icon" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" aria-label="GitHub">
  <i class="bi bi-github"></i>
</a>
:::

::: {.home-buttons}
[View My Projects](projects.qmd){.button .primary-button}
[View My Resume](resume.qmd){.button .secondary-button}
:::

## My interest in the field

::: {.skill-chips}
::: {.chip}
Marketing Analytics
:::

::: {.chip}
Customer Insights
:::

::: {.chip}
Business Strategy
:::

::: {.chip}
Data Storytelling
:::

::: {.chip}
Coffee Industry
:::

::: {.chip}
Education
:::
:::
